channel.title: GitHub Julia Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Julia in GitHub

item.title: JuliaRegistries/General
item.description: The official registry of general Julia packages

item.title: SciML/DifferentialEquations.jl
item.description: Multi-language suite for high-performance solvers of differential equations and scientific machine learning (SciML) components. Ordinary differential equations (ODEs), stochastic differential equations (SDEs), delay differential equations (DDEs), differential-algebraic equations (DAEs), and more in Julia.

item.title: TuringLang/DynamicPPL.jl
item.description: Implementation of domain-specific language (DSL) for dynamic probabilistic programming

item.title: SciML/SciMLBase.jl
item.description: The Base interface of the SciML ecosystem

item.title: JuliaPlots/Plots.jl
item.description: Powerful convenience for Julia visualizations and data analysis

item.title: LuxDL/Lux.jl
item.description: Elegant and Performant Scientific Machine Learning in Julia

item.title: MakieOrg/Makie.jl
item.description: Interactive data visualizations and plotting in Julia
